## Checklist

- [ ] CI is green (typecheck, test, build, lint)
- [ ] `pnpm changeset` was run
- [ ] Tests added for new behavior (happy path + failure mode)
- [ ] No regression of differentiation guards (rule 03)
- [ ] Documentation updated if public API changed
- [ ] No new dependencies without justification in PR description
